titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 723

p.seg: Let present and future know that Edward son of Peter of Restalrig, baron of the king of Scots, has granted and given and by this his charter made firm to Robert son of Matilda of Berwick and to all his heirs two tofts at Eyemouth, and one at Leith, honourably, freely, quitly, and in peace, from every custom and service, in feu and heritage, to be held of him and his heirs, rendering each year three toises of lace.

Witness Alexander of Softlaw, William son of Hugh of Restalrig, William provost of Berwick, William Benive, Alexander provost of Berwick, William Neve, Rainer, Roger of Palgrave clerk of Walter fitz Alan.
